token.description: Mailjet SMS API Bearer token. Used only for Bearer auth; never logged.

base_url.description: Mailjet SMS API base URL override for tests or proxies.

start_date.description: Unix-seconds lower bound sent as the FromTS query param on list/count streams.

end_date.description: Unix-seconds upper bound sent as the ToTS query param on list/count streams.

status_code.description: Optional Mailjet SMS StatusCode filter for message list/count requests; use the API's comma-separated code format when filtering multiple statuses.

recipient.description: Optional To filter for message list/count requests.

sms_ids.description: Optional IDs filter for the sms list stream; use Mailjet's comma-separated ID format.

sms_id.description: SMS message id used by the sms_message detail stream.

export_job_id.description: Mailjet export job id used by the sms_export detail stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
